name: One Minute Revelry
description: 30 colorful shots in three escalating acts — red palms blooming into gold willow, green palms bursting into red and silver glitter, then a brocade crown finale dripping with red and silver sparkle. A perfect starter show.

name: Firefly
description: 16 big aerial breaks packed with red and silver bouquets, bright blue stars, and crackling flower bursts. Short, punchy, and incredibly satisfying.

name: Band of Brothers
description: 12 elegant aerial shots with flowing lace-style bursts that cycle through red, white, and blue — then purple and green — then green and blue — each one transitioning gracefully to brilliant white. Graceful and eye-catching.

name: Sky Diving
description: Colorful smoke trails rise and bloom into parachute-style bursts in 5 vivid colors — then it finishes with 5 rapid-fire shots for a fun, one-of-a-kind finale the whole crowd will love.

name: Friday Night Frenzy
description: A colorful parade of silver and gold wandering bursts cycling through sea blue, red, baby green, orange, peach, and teal — finished with a crackling silver finale and brilliant red plum blossoms.

name: Willow Explosion
description: A rapid-fire 24-shot aerial cake that fills the sky with massive drooping golden willow bursts, each one showering brilliant blue stars as it falls. Beautiful, fast, and crowd-pleasing.

name: 2 Minutes Extravaganza
description: 63 shots and nearly 2 full minutes of nonstop sky action — palms, glitter, crackling rain, flying fish, peonies, and brocade crown bursts all capped with a rapid-fire finale. Our best bang for your buck.

name: Voice of Monster
description: 24 massive aerial shots that shake the sky with earth-rattling booms and enormous bursts. Intense, loud, and impossible to ignore — this one makes the whole neighborhood look up.

name: Something Red White and Blue
description: A 34-shot patriotic showcase — silver crackling mines, red and blue comets, glowing dust, blue dahlias, and peonies in red and blue. Perfect for the Fourth of July or any time you want to light up the sky in American colors.

name: Steel Navy
description: 78 shots fired in a Z-formation — colorful dahlia bursts, white glitter spreads, chrysanthemum breaks, and crackling red and green tails all build to a dramatic purple and green rain finale.

name: Whacky Tobacky
description: A sky-filling 9-shot powerhouse that launches massive golden sparkle bursts high into the air, each one raining glittering pink and red sparks at the center. Big, booming, and built to close the show.

name: Ghost Killer
description: Nine massive aerial bursts that slowly shift through hauntingly beautiful colors — warm peach, emerald green, and ocean blue — fading into each other for a mesmerizing 35–40 second sky show.

name: Double Down
description: A 9-shot aerial cake that throws up enormous ring-shaped bursts — golden palm tree rings, sparkling brocade rings, and bold color rings with a glittering red center. Layered, dramatic, and impossible to ignore.

name: Midnight
description: Our biggest show in a single box — 204 shots of Z-shaped star formations, crackling comet tails, palm bursts, and whistling ascents that build for nearly 3 minutes before detonating in a thundering 3-shot silver finale.
